Class Weapon

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Item
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.Weapon
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
AK47, AWP, BlankWeapon, M16, MeleeWeapon, Pistol, Shotgun, SMG
public abstract class Weapon extends Item implements Serializable
The Weapon class is an abstract representation of a weapon in the game. This class holds key properties for ranged or melee weapons such as ammunition, damage, fire rate, cooldown, reload mechanics, and visual/sound effects.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Weapon

      public Weapon(int maxAmmo, int magazineSize, double damage, double reloadTime, double scatterAngle, double fireRate, int bulletCountPerShot, double bulletSpeed, BulletType bulletType, String shootingSound, FireMode fireMode, String icon, String texture)
      Constructs a new Weapon instance with the provided parameters.
      Parameters:
      maxAmmo - the maximum ammunition available
      magazineSize - the capacity of the magazine
      damage - the damage per shot
      reloadTime - the reload duration for the weapon
      scatterAngle - the scatter angle for the shot (inaccuracy)
      fireRate - the rate of fire which is used to initialize the cooldown
      bulletCountPerShot - the number of bullets fired in one shot
      bulletSpeed - the speed at which bullets travel
      bulletType - the type of bullet used for the shot
      shootingSound - the sound identifier for the firing sound
      fireMode - the firing mode of the weapon
      icon - the icon identifying the weapon
      texture - the texture information for the weapon

  • Method Details

    • shoot

      public void shoot(double targetX, double targetY, double fromX, double fromY, Team shooterTeam)
      Calculates position for Bullet and creates one
      Parameters:
      targetX - target pos X
      targetY - target pos Y
      fromX - shooter pos X
      fromY - shooter pos Y
      shooterTeam - shooter's Team
